title: One Click One Block (1C1B)
description: Adds a little delay after breaking the first block, so you won't accidentally break the next block with an instant mining tool.
body:
# OneClickOneBlock ![](https://github.com/LucunJi/OneClickOneBlock/raw/master/icons/1024x256.png) Adds a little delay after breaking the first block, so you won't accidentally break the next block with an instant mining tool. ## ❔ Something Long Missing from Minecraft There's Efficiency V pickaxe, and there's Haste II beacon;
you even get Drills, Atomic Disassembler, or some more overpowered tools. But this is always the source of headache:
you misplace a block, you try to correct it, then oops, your favorite tool is so fast!
It digs through the misplaced block and destroys your fishtank.
Now you get water all over the place, the torch and carpets are gone, what a total mess. Let's look at the keyboard, it (almost) never double types.
The time proves its success, so why don't we put the same thing in Minecraft? ## ⭐ Features: - Configurable delay - Temporarily disable it with a hotkey - That's it! Simple and good. ## 💻 Compatibility Currently it supports Minecraft 1.20 - 1.21.8. More versions will be supported depending on popularity. The mod works on Fabric & NeoForge loaders (Forge for versions below 1.21). **Dependencies:** - Install [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/project/9s6osm5g) and [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/project/mOgUt4GM) for Fabric loader, - install [Configured](https://modrinth.com/project/HlpEBg3R) for Forge, - and NOTHING for NeoForge. ## 🐞 Report Bugs Before you reporting a bug, make sure the mods & loaders are **updated**. Make a [New Issue](https://github.com/LucunJi/OneClickOneBlock/issues/new), remember to include - **Minecraft logs** - Miencraft Version - modpack/other mods (with versions) ## 🏆 Credits This mod is inspired by [AnvilCraft](https://modrinth.com/project/vuISAWPc), also give this awesome mod a try!
